open_prs.note: Awaiting maintainer merge in GitHub UI. Batches #65 + #71 + #78 + #109.

feat(#78): integrate R-A8 longitudinal trajectory model into develop
feat(#32): integrate E3 analytical narratives + maps into develop

this_machine_data_state.note: MSS ingested. POI/EWR/LOR present. Keystone models populated; build green. E3 analysis scripts produce output to data/analysis/.

weekly_pr.note: #32 E3 NOT yet in PR#111 (opened before E3 integrated). E3 goes into next weekly PR.

unblocked_ready.title: [A6] Distance-weighting + Gi* hotspots + MAUP
unblocked_ready.note: ADR-0010 approved PySAL+H3. BLOCKED on spatial-methods.md (geo-DS + domain must draft and sign off docs/methodology/spatial-methods.md covering ADR-0010 C1-C8 BEFORE any R-A6/R-A9 model merges). Implementation can start in parallel but cannot merge without the document.

unblocked_ready.title: [D2] Source-completeness/coverage check on price/rent data
unblocked_ready.note: Epic D entry point. Independent of spatial-methods.md.

open_conditions_carried_forward: ADR-0010 geo-DS conditions C1-C8 → discharge in docs/methodology/spatial-methods.md under R-C1 before any R-A6/R-A9 model merges. Distance-weighting must COMPOSE WITH OSM completeness-bias correction (ADR-0008 §5).
#65 E1/E2 non-blocking conditions: H3b divergence honestly reported; H3c opposite direction (contested); both deferred to G2 methodology page.
R-A8 PASS WITH CONDITIONS: geo-DS conditions carried to spatial-methods.md and G2.
E3 geo-DS C2 (non-blocking): add C5 coverage-correction note wherever D3 dynamism shown in maps/narratives (before G2).
Clean-architecture: analysis/ layer uses CONFIGURABLE DuckDB connection (GENTRIDUCK_DB env var) — verified in E3 scripts.
next_session_decision: Draft docs/methodology/spatial-methods.md (geo-DS lead, ADR-0010 C1-C8) to unblock #69 [A6]. OR start #28 [D2] price/rent source completeness check (simpler, independent). Recommend spatial-methods.md first as it unblocks a larger track.
